heading: Tuesday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy in southeastern Vermont and southern New Hampshire; otherwise mainly clear or becoming so. Areas of valley fog, mainly south. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s, some lower 50s northeast. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny after any early fog. Warmer, with highs in mid to upper 80s, some lower 80s far north. Winds variable to southwest at around 5 mph.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly clear, mixing with some clouds after midnight. Lows in the upper 50s to lower 60s, mid 60s in the broader valleys west. Light winds, variable to southwest.
